sections.title: Origins
sections.content: Bezzera filed his first patent in 1901. Steam pressure dominated until the postwar era.

sections.title: The lever mechanism
sections.content: Achille Gaggia introduced the spring-loaded lever in 1947, producing the first true crema.

sections.title: Modern era
sections.content: Electric pumps replaced levers in the 1960s; PID temperature control followed in the 90s.
